relock_reason: Before any detector execution, replace human-facing npm, GitHub, and Smithery HTML with canonical machine-readable public endpoints; npm rejected the calibration user agent with HTTP 403 and Smithery HTML returned HTTP 429. Correct the MCP server-name encoding and bind the exact published 0.1.8 registry record after the invalid unencoded latest URL returned HTTP 404. Rules and release thresholds are unchanged.
prohibited_claim_classes: prevention or detection of hallucinations as a general capability
universal safety or trust guarantee for an LLM, agent, application, or repository
complete coverage of all LLM, agent, SDK, language, or framework surfaces
allowed_boundary_language: explicit denial of a prohibited capability
narrow statements about observable static source patterns
measured detector results that name the frozen cohort, denominator, detector version, and review method
